min_entry_age.source_quote: Self, Spouse, Parents, Parents-in-law Minimum – 18 years Maximum – 75 Years - The Proposer should be minimum 18 years on the Commencement date of the policy.

max_entry_age.source_quote: Self, Spouse, Parents, Parents-in-law Minimum – 18 years Maximum – 75 Years

min_child_entry_age.source_quote: Children upto 4 Minimum – 03 Months Maximum – 26 Years

sum_insured_options.source_quote: Sum Insured (SI) in (Rs.) Options Rs.5/7.5/10/15/20/25 Lakhs Rs. 5/7.5/10/15/20/25 Lakhs Rs.30/40/50/75 Lakhs, Rs.1/2/2.5/3/5 Crores

grace_period.source_quote: The grace period for payment of the premium for all types of insurance policies shall be: fifteen days where premium payment mode is monthly and thirty days in all other cases.

free_look_period.source_quote: Every policyholder of new individual health insurance policies, except for those policies with tenure of less than a year, shall be provided a free look period of 30 days beginning from the date of receipt of policy document

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: 30-day waiting period-Code-Excl03 a) Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within 30 days from the first policy commencement date shall be excluded except claims arising due to an accident

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Pre-Existing Disease (PED) and its direct complications shall be excluded until the expiry of 36 months under Basic and Plus plan and 24 months under Premiere plan

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Specified disease/procedure waiting period – Code – Excl02: a) Expenses related to the treatment of the listed Conditions, surgeries/treatments shall be excluded until the expiry of first 24 months of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the first policy with us.

maternity_waiting_months.source_quote: Maternity Cover Not Covered Reimbursement upto Rs.50,000/- per delivery after a waiting period of 36 months.

day_care_treatments_count.source_note: Per insurer baseline (Chola MS family plans: 141 day care procedures; Flexi Health: 539)

network_hospital_count.source_note: 13,500+ Cashless Hospitals ('Why Chola MS' section, scraped 2026-05-15)

policy_term_options_years.source_quote: Policy Tenure options 1 or 2 or 3 years

ayush_coverage.source_quote: AYUSH Treatment refers to the medical and / or hospitalisation treatments given under ‘Ayurveda, Unani, Siddha and Homeopathy systems’.

domiciliary_treatment.source_quote: Domiciliary Hospitalization means medical treatment for an illness/disease/injury which in the normal course would require care and treatment at a hospital but is actually taken while confined at home under any of the following circumstances: i.

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: Cashless Facility means a facility extended by the Insurer to the insured where the payments, of the costs of treatment undergone by the insured

geographic_coverage.source_quote: make payment within India and in Indian Rupees only for medical services or procedures rendered in or undertaken within India. The coverage under Global Hospitalization cover and Personal Accident shall be applicable worldwide.

policy_type_indemnity_or_fixed.source_quote: This policy covers on Individual Sum Insured basis and in case of family coverage on floater Sum Insured basis.

room_rent_capping.value: No room limit for Sum Insured above Rs.2 Lakhs (Rs.2000/day sub-limit for Rs.50k/1L/2L)
room_rent_capping.source_quote: Sublimit Room Rent Upto Rs.2000/- per day for Sum Insured Rs.50,000/-, Rs.1 Lakh & Rs. 2 Lakhs. No Room limit for Sum Insured above Rs.2 Lakhs

maternity_coverage.source_quote: Maternity Cover Not Covered Reimbursement upto Rs.50,000/- per delivery after a waiting period of 36 months.
